title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks details regarding its authentication mechanisms. Without knowing if multi-factor authentication (MFA) is implemented, or if password policies are enforced, attackers could potentially spoof user identities to gain unauthorized access. This could involve brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or phishing campaigns targeting weak passwords.
attack_vector: Exploitation of weak password policies, successful credential compromise through phishing or brute-force attacks, or leveraging vulnerabilities in the authentication protocol itself.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, regular rotation).
Regularly audit user accounts and disable inactive accounts.
